flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Black River Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.3k → $7.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Black River Technical College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Black River Technical College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 903).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Black River Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
